flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (74.6% → 63.9%).

flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.0k → $58.6k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.0k → $58.6k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology are 91% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($101.3k vs $52.9k).
